name: FortiGate SSL-VPN Honeypot
description: Mimics FortiGate SSL-VPN devices to capture brute-force attempts, symlink exploit probes, and malicious IP telemetry. Tool: https://github.com/PeterGabaldon/Fortigate.VPN-SSL.Honeypot. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #444 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map FortiGate SSL-VPN Honeypot output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved FortiGate SSL-VPN Honeypot output file to parse instead of running it live.
